---
title: "Home"
---

::::::: hero
![](images/hero.jpg){.hero-photo}

:::::: hero-text
::: hero-name
Harrison Gan
:::

::: hero-title
Marketing student.<br> Digital marketing creator.<br> Analytics-driven business thinker.
:::

I am a Cal Poly Pomona student focused on **marketing, brand promotion, customer engagement, and data-driven decision-making**.

My portfolio highlights my experience with Homey Design, Collegiate Entrepreneurs Organization, Google Analytics, dashboards, and professional business communication.

::: hero-buttons
[View Marketing Work](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [Google Analytics](google-analytics.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
::::::
:::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## What I Do

My marketing interests combine **creativity, business strategy, and analytics**.

I enjoy creating promotional content, improving brand communication, understanding customer behavior, and using data to support stronger marketing decisions.

## Featured Experience

### Homey Design Marketing

Developed experience with furniture marketing, product promotion, visual presentation, and customer-focused messaging for bedroom, dining room, and living room collections.

### CEO Club Marketing Leadership

Supported marketing, outreach, newsletters, social media content, and student engagement through the Collegiate Entrepreneurs Organization at Cal Poly Pomona.

### Marketing Analytics Coursework

Practiced using Google Analytics 4, dashboards, KPIs, Quarto, and data visualization to measure digital marketing performance.

## Skills

-   Digital marketing
-   Product promotion
-   Social media marketing
-   Brand messaging
-   Customer engagement
-   Newsletter communication
-   Event promotion
-   Google Analytics 4
-   KPI tracking
-   Dashboard creation
-   Quarto website development
-   Business communication

## Contact Me

**Want to know more about how my skill set can help you?**

Whether you’re looking for someone with marketing, business analytics, digital promotion, or customer engagement experience, I’d love to connect.

[harrisongan\@cpp.edu](mailto:harrisongan@cpp.edu) · [LinkedIn](www.linkedin.com/in/harrison-gan-1943842a3)
